benefits.description: Notices increased hip and knee pain when not taking peptides; ongoing maintenance for back disc and joint pain
Uses KLOW for 20-30 days when healing from specific injuries such as recent hand surgery
Uses GHK-Cu for hair and skin
Uses GHK-Cu for hair and skin

protocol_notes: Ongoing blend of GHK-Cu (2.5mg) and KPV as maintenance stack. Each other component in blend dosed at 0.5mg. Uses KLOW (20-30 day cycles) for acute healing only. Avoids BPC-157 and TB-500 for ongoing use due to angiogenesis concerns; prefers KPV for anti-inflammatory purposes without that effect. Has been using peptides long enough that absence is more noticeable than presence.
